title: Requirements for the Issuance of SRA. An SRA may be issued upon
content: 47 submission of the following requirements, among others: 48 49 a. Letter request from an authorized signatory of the LMA stating the exact date and 50 venue of the special recruitment activity, as well as the name/s of the designated 51 representative/s, copy furnished the concerned DMW Regional Office; 52 53 b. List of accredited principal/employer; 54 55 c. No objection certificate issued by the Public Employment Service Office (PESO) 56 or the duly authorized representative of the concerned local government unit; and 57 58 d. Notarized undertaking that the agency shall take full responsibility for the acts of 59 its representative officers and employees, and/or the employer or his/her 60 authorized representative. 61 23 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 1 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for the application for an SRA. 2 3
